nasb.text: “If men have a quarrel and one strikes the other with a stone or with his fist, and he does not die but remains in bed,

esv.text: “When men quarrel and one strikes the other with a stone or with his fist and the man does not die but takes to his bed,

cnv.text: “如果人彼此爭論，一個用石頭或拳頭打另一個，但他還沒有死，不過要躺在床上，

ccb.text: 倘若斗殴时一方用拳头或石块致另一方受伤、躺卧在床，但不至于死，
